ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Count of Guastalla|Prince of Molfetta|Duke of Ariano
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Born in Sicily, the brother of Cardinal Francesco. Founder of the Accademia degli Invaghiti in Mantova. For his biography see Molly Bourne, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
